info.title: SA CIB Account Information
info.description:
The CIB account information API allows Investec SA Corporate and institutional clients to access their account and transactional information (read-only) via an API.  
  
It can be used to retrieve account information such as:

*   Account and balance details
*   Account transactions
*   Current Orders and Shipment information
    

There are many possible use cases for the Account Information API: from extracting the data to aggregate it with financial data from other banking institutions to personal money management tools.  

**Release Notes**

 2023-06-21

* **Enhancement**: Added a sandbox environment 

2025-06-27

* **Enhancement**: Added Current Orders and Shipment information 

    
# Sandbox

To use the sandbox environment use the base url `https://openapisandbox.investec.com` for authentication and all subsequent api requests. 

 Authenticating: 
* **Auth URL (POST):** `https://openapisandbox.investec.com/identity/v2/oauth2/token` 
* **header**  `Authorization: Basic QXVQd2poU3k3a2FVd2djaDJJc0xGR1FPRUV4QVppaDU6N3ljWVhLYWtHZDZBU002Zg==`  
* **header**  `x-api-key: QXVQd2poU3k3a2FVd2djaDJJc0xGR1FPRUV4QVppaDU6YVc1MlpYTjBaV010ZW1FdFkybGlMV0ZqWTI5MWJuUnpMWE5oYm1SaWIzZz0=` 
* **header** `Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded` 
* **data-urlencode** `grant_type=client_credentials` 

 The basic authorization header are as follows ( *clientId:* `AuPwjhSy7kaUwgch2IsLFGQOEExAZih5` *secret:* `7ycYXKakGd6ASM6f` ) Eg. Base64-encode ( {clientId}:{secret} )

# Authentication
